goal: Reproduce key results from XOmiVAE (https://academic.oup.com/bib/article/22/6/bbab315/6353242): open the paper in the browser, download the PDF, extract hyperparameters, retrieve and run the official code, prepare an omics dataset, train/evaluate the model, compute gene- and latent-dimension attributions (Deep SHAP), explain VAE-derived clusters (Welch’s t-test on latent dimensions), and produce a reproducibility report mapping our outputs to the paper’s claims.

assertions.description: Paper was accessed via Browser MCP (OUP link included in goal) and archived
assertions.evaluation_criteria: toolomics-browser.navigate() opened the OUP article; toolomics-browser.get_downloadable_links() then toolomics-browser.download_file() saved the PDF; logs include final URL

assertions.description: Hyperparameters and methods details extracted from the PDF
assertions.evaluation_criteria: toolomics-pdf.initialize_pdf_navigation() + search_in_current_session() located settings (e.g., latent size, optimizer, LR, epochs, batch size) and methods (Deep SHAP, Welch’s t-test)

assertions.description: Official XOmiVAE repository obtained and environment captured
assertions.evaluation_criteria: toolomics-browser.navigate() opened the GitHub repo; toolomics-shell.execute_command() ran git clone and created a conda/venv
toolomics-csv.load_csv_from_path() imported expression (and/or multi-omics) data; toolomics-csv.get_csv_stats() saved schema; integrity checks (sample IDs overlap, NA rates)

assertions.description: Training executed deterministically with seeds and config
assertions.evaluation_criteria: toolomics-shell.execute_command() ran training (e.g., python main.py --seed ...); checkpoints saved; config.yaml and seeds saved
metrics (accuracy, AUROC/F1) written; a table compares against paper-reported results with commentary on deviations

assertions.description: Gene-level and latent-dimension attributions computed (Deep SHAP)
assertions.evaluation_criteria: CSV of top contributing genes per class and latent-dimension↔gene correlation matrix exported to results/; at least one figure (heatmap/bar plot) saved

assertions.description: Unsupervised cluster explanations produced per paper
assertions.evaluation_criteria: Latent space clustered (e.g., k-means/HDBSCAN); Welch’s t-test run per latent dimension to separate clusters; results and plots saved
dimensionKnockOutExperiments.py (or equivalent) executed; performance deltas per latent dimension reported

assertions.description: Comparison to paper figures/tables is explicit
assertions.evaluation_criteria: reproducibility_report.md maps outputs to paper claims (e.g., SHAP-based gene rankings, latent explanations, cluster separation) with figure/table references

assertions.description: Error handling and fallbacks in place
assertions.evaluation_criteria: If OUP PDF unavailable, logged with actionable messages
filesystem.directory_tree for {papers,models,results,figures} shows created files with non-zero sizes
